title: GalacticTweaks
body:
---

[ ~ The Galacticraft Tweaker Mod ~ ]

That's Not A CraftTweaker Addon

The mod was initially a re-creation of the GalacticScience-Tweaks Mod to allow players to spawn into the world with full oxygen gear equipped. However, I got the idea to add other tweaks and utilities that others may find useful when playing with Galacticraft.
Features/Wiki
⁣
  ⮚ Oxygen Gear on Spawn/Death
⁣  ⮚ NPCs(Villagers/Animals) breathe in space ⁣
  ⮚ Move duplicated planets from SOL to another galaxy ⁣
  ⮚ Customize Comet spawns in GC/Addon dimensions ⁣
  ⮚ Disable music when on planets
⁣  ⮚ GC Compressor ore dictionary fix ⁣
  ⮚ New SpaceRace command ⁣
  ⮚ Configurable spawn dimension ⁣
  ⮚ Unlock any schematic
⁣  ⮚ Admin Teleport (Replaces /dimensiontp) --- Requires the following mod that is currently not hosted on Modrinth AsmodeusCore (version 0.30.0) on CurseForge
